news.headline: Pakistan expresses concern at storming of Kuwait’s consulate in Basra
news.summary:
<p>Pakistan on Wednesday expressed concern at the storming and vandalism of Kuwait’s consulate in Iraq’s Basra, saying the act was “inconsistent with established diplomatic norms and international law”.</p>

news.headline: Naval Postgraduate School Alumni Lead Artemis II Homebound
news.summary: Retired Navy Capt. Reid Wiseman and Navy Capt. Victor Glover — Naval Postgraduate School alumni — are using their years of experience as test pilots, advanced education and astronaut training to guide the Artemis II crew safely back to Earth.

news.headline: Epic Fury Quelled for Now, Objectives Accomplished, U.S. Forces Remain Ready
news.summary: In fewer than 40 days, unrelenting military action by America's joint force has helped accomplish all the goals President Donald J. Trump set for Operation Epic Fury.
